title: thalictrum × spurium nothosubsp. spurium
intro: Thalictrum × spurium nothosubsp. spurium, also known as Meadow Rue, is a perennial flowering plant that is a hybrid of the Thalictrum aquilegiifolium and Thalictrum rivale species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Meadow Rue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support the immune system, while also providing antioxidant and anti-bacterial effects. Herbal preparations of Meadow Rue include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
